'''thozharaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:eyeleted|eyeleted]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-zh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eyeleted|eyeleted]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thozharaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thozharithi|thozharithi]] || [[word:thozhariji|thozhariji]] || [[word:thozharishi|thozharishi]] || [[word:thozhariki|thozhariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thozharuthuthu|thozharuthuthu]] || [[word:thozharujuju|thozharujuju]] || [[word:thozharushushu|thozharushushu]] || [[word:thozharukuku|thozharukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozharuthu|thozharuthu]] || [[word:thozharuju|thozharuju]] || [[word:thozharushu|thozharushu]] || [[word:thozharuku|thozharuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozharufthuf|thozharufthuf]] || [[word:thozharufjuf|thozharufjuf]] || [[word:thozharufshuf|thozharufshuf]] || [[word:thozharufkuf|thozharufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thozharethe|thozharethe]] || [[word:thozhareje|thozhareje]] || [[word:thozhareshe|thozhareshe]] || [[word:thozhareke|thozhareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thozharothotho|thozharothotho]] || [[word:thozharojojo|thozharojojo]] || [[word:thozharoshosho|thozharoshosho]] || [[word:thozharokoko|thozharokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozharotho|thozharotho]] || [[word:thozharojo|thozharojo]] || [[word:thozharosho|thozharosho]] || [[word:thozharoko|thozharoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozharofthof|thozharofthof]] || [[word:thozharofjof|thozharofjof]] || [[word:thozharofshof|thozharofshof]] || [[word:thozharofkof|thozharofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thozharĂŻfthĂŻf|thozharĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thozharĂŻfjĂŻf|thozharĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thozharĂŻfshĂŻf|thozharĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thozharĂŻfkĂŻf|thozharĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thozharĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|thozharĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thozharĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|thozharĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thozharĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|thozharĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thozharĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|thozharĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozharĂŻfthĂŻf|thozharĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thozharĂŻfjĂŻf|thozharĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thozharĂŻfshĂŻf|thozharĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thozharĂŻfkĂŻf|thozharĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozharĂŻfthĂŻf|thozharĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thozharĂŻfjĂŻf|thozharĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thozharĂŻfshĂŻf|thozharĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thozharĂŻfkĂŻf|thozharĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thozharĂŠthĂŠ|thozharĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:thozharĂŠjĂŠ|thozharĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:thozharĂŠshĂŠ|thozharĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:thozharĂŠkĂŠ|thozharĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thozharathatha|thozharathatha]] || [[word:thozharajaja|thozharajaja]] || [[word:thozharashasha|thozharashasha]] || [[word:thozharakaka|thozharakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozharatha|thozharatha]] || [[word:thozharaja|thozharaja]] || [[word:thozharasha|thozharasha]] || [[word:thozharaka|thozharaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozharafthaf|thozharafthaf]] || [[word:thozharafjaf|thozharafjaf]] || [[word:thozharafshaf|thozharafshaf]] || [[word:thozharafkaf|thozharafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thozharasha|thozharasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thozharshĂ«sha|thozharshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thozharosha|thozharosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thozharmusha|thozharmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thozharyasha|thozharyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothozharnkshĂ«sha|gothozharnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothozharnkrosha|gothozharnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothozharnkmusha|gothozharnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothozharnkyasha|gothozharnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thozhazharasha|thozhazharasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thozhazharshĂ«sha|thozhazharshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thozhazharosha|thozhazharosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thozhazharmusha|thozhazharmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thozhazharyasha|thozhazharyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothozhazharnkshĂ«sha|gothozhazharnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothozhazharnkrosha|gothozhazharnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothozhazharnkmusha|gothozhazharnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothozhazharnkyasha|gothozhazharnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thezhĂŠrasha|thezhĂŠrasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thezhĂŠrshĂ«sha|thezhĂŠrshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thezhĂŠrosha|thezhĂŠrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thezhĂŠrmusha|thezhĂŠrmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thezhĂŠryasha|thezhĂŠryasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothezhĂŠrnkshĂ«sha|gothezhĂŠrnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothezhĂŠrnkrosha|gothezhĂŠrnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothezhĂŠrnkmusha|gothezhĂŠrnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothezhĂŠrnkyasha|gothezhĂŠrnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thozhfarasha|thozhfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thozhfarshĂ«sha|thozhfarshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thozhfarosha|thozhfarosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thozhfarmusha|thozhfarmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thozhfaryasha|thozhfaryasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothozhfarnkshĂ«sha|gothozhfarnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothozhfarnkrosha|gothozhfarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothozhfarnkmusha|gothozhfarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothozhfarnkyasha|gothozhfarnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
